text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One night, as I'm walking near the<n>pool...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Perfect. No one's swimming.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I should be safe.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I spot an Umamusume about to hop<n>into the pool
late at night. Why has she<n>chosen such an odd
time?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whooooa! Is that Taishiiiin?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It appears so, just as I thought.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Agh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I didn't tell a soul... What are you two<n>doing
here?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Well, you haven't been coming to the<n>pool lately!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But you have a lot of swimsuits, and<n>we thought
it was weird, so...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Umm... What was the next part again,<n>Hayahide?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You didn't participate in pool training,<n>yet there
were signs of you washing<n>your swimsuits.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
In other words, there was a<n>possibility that you
were going to the<n>pool at night to avoid being
seen by<n>others.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's it! Detective Hayahide<n>solves the
case! Got that, Taishin?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Good job catching mered-handed, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Your reasons aside—it's not wise to<n>train so late
at night.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Sleeping late is detrimental to your<n>internal clock.
This can lead to a<n>variety of issues such as poor<n>
concentration and high blood<n>pressure.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah, whatever.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Just leave me alone, all right? It's<n>none of your
business.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: No waaay! We can't do that! Ifyou're gonna swim, then I'll swimwith you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I don't need you to—wait, when did<n>you change
into your swimsuit?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Excellent. Seeing as you're both<n>ready to go, I
shall be your coach.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, I'm fine on my own. You<n>two should
be asleep by now. Don't<n>force yourself to—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'M READY TO ROCK AND ROOOLLL!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: All right, Ticket. Start!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey, come on!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ughhh... I'm so sleepy... Blub,blub...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... We're normally sleeping at this<n>time! I'm
becoming... drowsy...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: H-help me, Taishiiiin... Gurgle...Splutter...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh dear, I can't hold on. Falling...<n>aslee...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Argh, dammit! I knew this wouldhappen!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I told you guys not to force<n>yourselves!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin wakes up the failed<n>swimmers and
manages to get them<n>all back to their dorm.
